What are the bonding requirements?

Contract — Mario's Bistro

Generating Contract

Building from RFP requirements and your templates

GENERATED CONTRACT

Plumbing Services Agreement

Project: Mario's Bistro — Commercial Kitchen  ·  Contractor: Your Company LLC  ·  Client: Mario's Bistro Inc.

1. Scope of Work

Contractor shall provide all labor, materials, equipment, and supervision necessary for the complete plumbing rough-in and fixture installation for the commercial kitchen facility located at 412 River Road, North Bergen, NJ 07047, totaling approximately 4,200 square feet.

2. Project Timeline

Work shall commence within 10 business days of contract execution and shall be substantially complete within 8 weeks. Contractor shall maintain a detailed schedule and provide weekly progress updates.

3. Compensation

Total Contract Value: $158,500.00
Payment Terms: Net-60 from invoice date Editing
Retainage: 10% held until substantial completion

4. Insurance & Bonding

Contractor shall maintain commercial general liability of $2,000,000 per occurrence. Performance and payment bonds of 100% contract value from AM Best A-rated surety required.

5. Warranty

All work warranted for two (2) years from substantial completion against defects in materials and workmanship.
